rules._comment_redundant_roles: ACCESSIBILITY-BRIEF §1 mandates explicit role='list' on <ul>/<ol> because Safari strips list semantics when list-style:none. Override the default lint rule.
rules._comment_tabindex: ACCESSIBILITY-BRIEF §5 mandates tabindex=0 on <pre> for keyboard-scrollable code blocks; §0 needs it on <main> for route focus; Kanban listbox uses tabindex=0 per §2.
